name: Mom's Potato Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can cream of chicken soup, condensed
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix potatoes, 1/2 cup melted margarine, salt, pepper, onions, cream of chicken soup, sour cream, and grated cheddar cheese together.
2. Spread the mixture into a greased 9x13-inch pan.
3. Mix 1/4 cup melted margarine with corn flakes and sprinkle over the potatoes.
4. Sprinkle paprika on top.
5. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
